definitions: 不利的；有害的（常用于 adverse effects 表示“负面影响/不良后果”）

examples.text: According to psychology, what do people strive to do following the initial stage of their life? A) Fulfill individual needs without incurring adverse effects of human drives.
examples.explanation: adverse 在这里表示“负面的、不利的、有害的”。adverse effects of human drives 可理解为“人类驱动力带来的不良影响/负面后果”。
